mxCell.value:
Runtime Ownership Map
World map root to Asset and AssetInfo runtime ownership tree. Solid edges are owning lifetime; dashed edges are non-owning references or indexes.

MainApp
Owns AssetLoader and Assets runtime session objects.

AssetLoader
Owns Room graph and bootstrap spawning pipeline. Moves room asset ownership into WorldGrid.

Assets
Primary runtime manager. Owns world_grid_, camera, render bridge, and runtime traversal buffers.

WorldGrid (World Map Root)
Canonical owner of live GridPoint nodes and Asset lifetimes through GridPoint occupants unique_ptr.

AssetLibrary
Shared metadata store keyed by asset name. Provides shared_ptr AssetInfo entries.

Room Ownership
AssetLoader::all_rooms_ owns Room unique_ptr values. Assets::rooms_ keeps non-owning Room* references.

ChunkManager
Owns Chunk storage and active chunk pointer views.

Chunk
Owns tile records and keeps non-owning Asset* membership list.

GridTile
Chunk-owned tile value (world_rect and texture handle).

points_ map
WorldGrid-owned unordered_map of GridPoint value objects.

GridPoint
Node with occupancy ownership, hierarchy links, region metadata, and projection cache fields.

GridPoint::occupants
vector unique_ptr Asset. Canonical owner of live Asset objects.

Asset
Runtime entity object with shared metadata ref, owned runtime modules, caches, anchors, and behavior state.

Asset runtime modules
controller unique_ptr, anim update unique_ptr, animation runtime unique_ptr.

Asset runtime state
render_package, composite and mesh caches, pos and provisional grid point, anchor caches, runtime box caches.

AssetInfo
Shared metadata object. Owns areas, animations, mappings, tags, follower binding, and spawn payload metadata.

AssetInfo areas and Area
NamedArea records own Area geometry objects with render frame metadata.

AssetInfo animations and Animation
Map string to Animation values owned by AssetInfo.

Animation ownership breakdown
Expands to FrameInfo, FrameVariantInfo, anchor-point data, frame-cache arrays, and texture resources.

AssetInfo other metadata
mappings, tag caches, follower binding spec, custom controller key, and spawn groups payload.

WarpedScreenGrid internals
CameraController and visible_points or visible_assets or asset_to_point non-owning pointer caches.

SceneRenderer internals
GridTileRenderer, GeometryBatcher, CompositeAssetRenderer and draw pipeline state.

TextureLoadQueue
Worker thread, pending or ready queues, callback pipeline, and placeholder texture.

DynamicFogSystem
Owns fog textures, assignment map, and active fog sprites.

DynamicBoundarySystem
Owns boundary type config, assignment maps, animation state maps, region caches, and active boundary sprites.

Scene GPU textures
scene_composite_tex, postprocess_tex, blur_tex, sky_texture and dimensions.

Asset refs and queues
children Asset* refs, neighbor and impassable list handles, pending attack queue, and mutex.

Legend
Blue = core runtime owners
Teal = world map ownership layer
Green = asset runtime layer
Purple = metadata ownership layer
Orange = renderer/GPU resources
Gray = non-owning indices or references
Edges: owns (solid), shared_ptr (diamond dashed), ref/index (dashed), moved (teal dashed).

AssetList
Owned neighbor and impassable views with non-owning candidate pointers and membership maps.

WorldGrid indexes
residency map Asset* to Chunk*, key or id maps, and root node id list.

Assets active lists
all, active, filtered, traversal and collision lists hold non-owning Asset* views.

Room staging assets
Room::assets unique_ptr entries are transferred to WorldGrid ownership at bootstrap.
Asset* to Chunk* and key indexes

AssetLibrary::info_by_name_
unordered_map<string, shared_ptr<AssetInfo>> storing library-owned metadata entries.

Animation (runtime ownership root)
Owns movement_paths_, frame_cache_, variant_steps_, frames pointer view, and AudioClip state.

movement_paths_
vector<vector<AnimationFrame>> value storage. Canonical owner of FrameInfo records.

AnimationFrame (FrameInfo)
Per-frame movement, prev/next links, variants, anchor_points, and hit/attack box data.

FrameVariant (FrameVariantInfo)
Variant index + source_rect + uses_atlas + texture pointers (base/foreground/background).

DisplacedAssetAnchorPoint
name, texture_x, texture_y, and depth_offset in canonical texture pixel coordinates.

Animation::frame_cache_
vector<FrameCache> owning cache layer that manages per-frame variant texture lifetimes.

FrameCache
Per-frame cache entry with texture arrays and variant metadata arrays.

FrameCache texture arrays
vectors of SDL_Texture* for base, foreground, and background texture layers.

SDL_Texture objects
GPU textures loaded by AnimationLoader and released by Animation::clear_texture_cache.

FrameCache metadata arrays
widths, heights, source_rects, and uses_atlas aligned by variant index.

variant_steps_
vector<float> canonical scale steps used to select frame variants.

Animation::frames pointer view
vector<AnimationFrame*> to primary path frames; non-owning playback/index view.

Frame boxes
FrameHitBoxes and FrameAttackBoxes containers plus lookup maps by box name.

AudioClip::AudioBuffer
shared_ptr audio sample buffer referenced by Animation::audio_clip.

Asset anchor runtime registry
Asset-owned anchor_handles_, anchor_points_, and anchor_name_to_index_ map.

AnchorHandle
Per-anchor resolved/cache state with UpdateKey and non-owning world::GridPoint* link.

AnchorPoint runtime state
Runtime-facing anchor outputs: screen/world coordinates, world_z, resolution layer, and exists flag.
